name: programming-screen-reader
description: A code-aware screen reader layer for programmers.

commands.title: Programming Screen Reader: Read Current Line
Programming Screen Reader: Read Current Symbol
Programming Screen Reader: Read Current Scope
Programming Screen Reader: Read Diagnostics Near Cursor

programmingScreenReader.coreBinaryPath.description: Path to the compiled code_reader_core binary. If empty, the extension falls back to the 'cargo run' command.

programmingScreenReader.speechEnabled.description: Speak returned reader output using the configured speech command.

programmingScreenReader.speechCommand.description: Command used to speak the returned reader output.
